name: rss-newsletter-extractor-actor
title: RSS and Newsletter Page Extractor
description: Find RSS, Atom, JSON feed links, and likely newsletter/archive update links from public pages.

pages.title: Public pages
pages.description: Public blog, changelog, release, newsletter, or archive pages to inspect.

prefill.html: June newsletterArchive

html.title: Optional HTML
html.description: Optional saved HTML for offline testing or controlled runs.

output.title: RSS and newsletter extraction results
output.description: Default dataset containing discovered feed records and likely newsletter or update links.

results.title: Results
results.description: Default dataset records produced by the actor.

record_type.title: Record type
record_type.description: Either feed for a declared feed URL or item for a likely newsletter/archive/update link.

url.title: Discovered URL
url.description: Absolute URL for the feed or likely update item.

type.title: Feed type
type.description: rss, atom, json-feed, or json for feed records.

score.title: Heuristic score
score.description: Newsletter/archive/update relevance score for item records.

error.title: Error
error.description: Fetch or extraction error for pages that could not be processed.
